mapper.sql: id::text AS id, name, summary, description, duration_minutes AS "durationMinutes", price_per_person AS "pricePerPerson", min_participants AS "minParticipants", max_participants AS "maxParticipants", available_days AS "availableDays", operating_hours AS "operatingHours", preparation_notes AS "preparationNotes", main_image_id::text AS "mainImageId", image_ids::text[] AS "imageIds", featured_yn AS "featuredYn", active_yn AS "activeYn", sort_order AS "sortOrder", created_at AS "createdAt", created_by::text AS "createdBy", updated_at AS "updatedAt", updated_by::text AS "updatedBy"
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)::text AS count FROM program WHERE active_yn = 'Y'
SELECT name FROM program WHERE id = ${id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM program WHERE id = ${id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO program ( name, summary, description, duration_minutes, price_per_person, min_participants, max_participants, available_days, operating_hours, preparation_notes, main_image_id, image_ids, featured_yn, active_yn, sort_order, created_by, updated_by ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{summary}, #{description}, #{durationMinutes}, #{pricePerPerson}, #{minParticipants}, #{maxParticipants}, ${availableDays}, #{operatingHours}, #{preparationNotes}, ${mainImageId}, ${imageIds}, #{featuredYn}, #{activeYn}, #{sortOrder}, ${createdBy}, ${createdBy} ) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE program
name = #{name}, summary = #{summary}, description = #{description}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, price_per_person = #{pricePerPerson}, min_participants = #{minParticipants}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, available_days = ${availableDays}, operating_hours = #{operatingHours}, preparation_notes = #{preparationNotes}, main_image_id = ${mainImageId}, image_ids = ${imageIds}, featured_yn = #{featuredYn}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, updated_by = ${updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
mapper.sql: id::text AS id, program_id::text AS "programId", session_date AS "sessionDate", start_time AS "startTime", capacity, active_yn AS "activeYn", created_at AS "createdAt", updated_at AS "updatedAt"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM program_session WHERE id = ${id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO program_session (program_id, session_date, start_time, capacity, active_yn, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (${programId}, #{sessionDate}::date, #{startTime}, #{capacity}, #{activeYn}, ${createdBy}, ${createdBy}) RETURNING
mapper.update:
UPDATE program_session
session_date = #{sessionDate}::date, start_time = #{startTime}, capacity = #{capacity}, active_yn = #{activeYn}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = ${id} RETURNING
